pages.title: Flag Master: World Flags Quiz
pages.description:
Match flags to their respective countries in a timed quiz challenge that tests memory and geographical knowledge. Players identify national flags from a diverse selection, with each correct match advancing a streak-based scoring system. The game demands quick recognition and sharp recall to climb leaderboards and unlock new flag sets.

Key Features

• Flag identification mechanic  
• Click-based country selection  
• Streak scoring system  
• Timed quiz mode  
• Global flag database

pages.title: Quiz 10 Seconds Math
pages.description:
Solve rapid-fire math questions within a strict countdown, testing quick mental calculations under pressure. Players answer numeric puzzles featuring addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division challenges in short bursts. The game sharpens arithmetic speed as players race against the clock to achieve high scores and improve their reaction time.

Key Features

• Timed arithmetic problem solving  
• Keyboard input for answers  
• Increasing question difficulty  
• Score multiplier for fast responses  
• Minimalist numeric quiz interface

pages.title: Sprunki Quiz
pages.description:
Answer questions by selecting correct options in timed quiz rounds, testing knowledge and reaction speed. Choose from varied question formats to advance through levels with increasing difficulty, aiming to improve accuracy under pressure. Quick decision-making fuels progression in this casual trivia challenge designed for kids and teens.

Key Features

• Timed multiple-choice questions  
• Fast-paced answer selection  
• Level-based difficulty scaling  
• Score tracking and accuracy metrics  
• Cartoon-styled quiz interface

pages.title: Quiz Master
pages.description:
Answer rapid-fire trivia questions using timed multiple-choice rounds to earn points and climb leaderboards. The core quiz mechanic challenges memory and quick thinking across diverse categories. Players advance through increasing difficulty levels that test knowledge under pressure. This casual quiz game targets teens and kids looking for fast-paced, brain-teasing entertainment.

Key Features

• Timed multiple-choice rounds  
• Rapid answer selection control  
• Progressive difficulty tiers  
• Score-based ranking system  
• Casual trivia question themes
